component.name: TETR.IO
component.summary: Puzzle together in this modern yet familiar online stacker!

description.p: **This is a community package of TETR.IO and not officially supported by osk.**
TETR.IO is a fast-paced multiplayer block stacking game. Play in real-time against players from all over the world, or challenge yourself in singleplayer modes like Marathon, Blitz, or Sprint.
This package installs the official TETR.IO desktop client wrapped with a native GTK4/Libadwaita launcher that allows you to easily toggle hardware offloading and Wayland rendering.

ul.li: Customizable controls, visual themes, and audio settings
Native launcher supporting Discrete GPU offloading and native Wayland
